multimediaviewer-desc: Kordhi thumbnails si ay u noqdaan kuwo waaweyn gudaha is-dhexgal shaashad-buuxda ah
multimediaviewer-file-page: U gudub bogga faylka u dhigma
multimediaviewer-multiple-authors: {{PLURAL:$1|hal qoraa oo dheeraad ah|$1 qoraa oo dheeraad ah}}
multimediaviewer-metadata-error: Kuma suurtagelin in la soo geliyo faahfaahinta sawirka (khalad: $1)
multimediaviewer-file-not-found-error: Waan ka xunnahay, faylka $1 lama soo bandhigi karo maadaama uusan ku jirin bogga hadda jira.
multimediaviewer-thumbnail-error: Waan ka xunnahay, faylka lama soo bandhigi karo
multimediaviewer-thumbnail-error-descrip: Waxay u muuqataa in ay jirto dhibaato farsamo. Waxaad $1 haddii ay sii socoto. Khalad: $2
multimediaviewer-restriction-2257: Sawirkan waxa ku jira waxyaabo galmo cad oo laga yaabo inay hoos yimaadaan Sharciga Ilaalinta Carruurta iyo Ka hortagga Muuqaalada Anshax-xumada ee Maraykanka.
multimediaviewer-restriction-aus-reserve: Sawirkan waxaa lagu qaaday keyd ka tirsan Barwaaqo-sooranka Ustaraaliya, mana loo isticmaali karo faa’iido ganacsi la’aan oggolaansho.
multimediaviewer-restriction-communist: Sawirkan waxa ku jira astaamo shuuci ah oo laga yaabo in laga mamnuuco dalal qaar.
multimediaviewer-restriction-costume: Sawirkan waxa uu muujinayaa dhar labbis ah oo laga yaabo in ay hoos yimaadaan xannibaado sharci.
multimediaviewer-restriction-currency: Sawirkan waxa uu matalayaa lacag, waxaana laga yaabaa in uu hoos yimaado xannibaado sharci.
multimediaviewer-restriction-design: Naqshadda mawduuca sawirkan waxaa laga yaabaa in ay leedahay xuquuq daabacaad, isla markaana ay hoos imaan karto xannibaado sharci.
multimediaviewer-restriction-fan-art: Sawirkan waa farshaxan taageere, dib u isticmaalkiisuna waxa uu hoos imaan karaa xannibaado sharci.
multimediaviewer-restriction-ihl: Sawirkan waxa ku jira astaamo ay xaddidayaan Sharciga Caalamiga ah ee Bani’aadantinimada.
multimediaviewer-restriction-insignia: Sawirkan waxa ku jira astaamo rasmi ah oo laga yaabo inay hoos yimaadaan xannibaado sharci.
multimediaviewer-restriction-ita-mibac: Sawirkan waxa uu dib u soo bandhigayaa hanti ka tirsan dhaxalka dhaqanka Talyaaniga, waxaana xaddiday sharciga Talyaaniga.
multimediaviewer-restriction-nazi: Sawirkan waxa ku jira astaamo Nazi ama faashist ah oo laga yaabo in laga mamnuuco dalal qaar.
multimediaviewer-restriction-personality: Sawirkan waxa ku jira dad leh xuquuq sharci ah oo xaddidi karta dib u isticmaalka sawirka qaarkood la’aanta oggolaansho.
multimediaviewer-restriction-trademarked: Sawirkan waxa ku jira waxyaabo laga yaabo inay hoos yimaadaan sharciyada summadaha ganacsiga.
multimediaviewer-restriction-default: Sawirkan waxa laga yaabaa in uu hoos yimaado xannibaado sharci oo ka baxsan sharciga xuquuqda daabacaadda. Faahfaahinta ka eeg bogga sharaxaadda faylka.
multimediaviewer-restriction-default-and: Sawirkan waxa laga yaabaa in uu sii hoos yimaado xannibaado sharci oo kale oo ka baxsan sharciga xuquuqda daabacaadda. Faahfaahinta ka eeg bogga sharaxaadda faylka.
multimediaviewer-reuse-copy-share: Xulo oo nuqul ka samee isku-xirka lagu wadaagayo faylkan (haddii la taageero)
multimediaviewer-reuse-copy-embed: Xulo oo nuqul ka samee koodhka lagu dhexgelinayo faylkan (haddii la taageero)
multimediaviewer-download-xl-button-name: Soo dejiso cabbir aad u weyn
multimediaviewer-share-explanation: Nuqul ka samee oo si xor ah u wadaag xiriirkan
multimediaviewer-embed-explanation: Isticmaal koodhkan si aad u dhexgeliso faylka
multimediaviewer-default-embed-dimension: Cabbirka sawirka yar ee caadiga ah
multimediaviewer-description-page-button: Faahfaahin dheeraad ah oo ku saabsan faylkan
multimediaviewer-description-page-popup-: Faahfaahin dheeraad ah oo ku saabsan faylkan ee $1
multimediaviewer-credit-popup-text-more: Eeg qoraaga iyo isha oo buuxda
multimediaviewer-download-attribution-ct: Waxaad u baahan tahay inaad xusto qoraaga
multimediaviewer-download-attribution-co: Xulo oo nuqul ka samee (haddii la taageero) qoraalka xusitaanka ee faylkan
multimediaviewer-reuse-warning-deletion: Faylkan waxaa loo tixgeliyaa in la tirtiri doono.
multimediaviewer-reuse-warning-nonfree: Faylkan ma laha shati bilaash ah.
multimediaviewer-reuse-warning-generic: Hubi [$1 faahfaahiintiisa] ka hor intaadan isticmaalin.
